title: helosis cayennensis subsp. mexicana
intro: Helosis cayennensis subsp. mexicana, also known as Mexican helosis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ochnaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mexican helosis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions such as arthritis and wound healing. Mexican helosis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
